name: Divine Heritage || Leah
description:
"NONONO- Th- The coffee machine broke down on its own!"
///

OC bot hooray! I finally wanted to make this idea a reality, so here we are.

The gist is simple. Leah is a secretary fox demi-human who's been working at a draining, tabloid publishing Black Company for a few years, that recently found out that she is a kitsune. So now she has to juggle between her workload as a secretary at the Black Company she works at, and maybe getting some followers at night.

Finding yourself is hard, especially when everything just sort of starts to numb over. This is a story about getting out of such ditch one way or another. Expect Fluff, A bit of comedy and shenanigans, She's a good bean so treat her well.

This is quite frankly anyPOV. Monster, demi, anthro, human, all should work if I wrote my prompts right, since the world has integrated all into society.

You have multiple scenarios:
1 - You're the new guy to her workplace, and she's new to being a Kitsune. (Office scen.)
2 - You see Leah making a shrine while in Kitsune form. (Confrontation scen.)
3 - Sorta RPG? You and Leah take up a few requests at the shrine for the night. (Adventurous scen.)

Not much else for update. BS2 posting? Ehhhhhh sometime??? We'll see. I dunno comment down which BS2 character and then, like the miraculous hand of God, I might do something about it. Might

P.S. Gens were done by me using yodayo

P.P.S. Started making spritework animations of my own for a CV-esque game
creator: Ghosterinoes
